title: ChatGPT Statistics (2026) – Active Users & Growth Data
text:
ChatGPT Statistics (2026) – Active Users & Growth Data
By
Shubham Singh
/
March 25, 2026
ChatGPT currently has 900 million weekly active users, a 500 million increase since February 2025. At the same time, India also reached 100 million weekly active users.
Additionally, ChatGPT MAU (Monthly visits) reached 5.35 billion in February 2026, down 6.5% from 5.72 billion in January 2026.
In this article, we break down ChatGPT statistics. We will look at ChatGPT’s growth, users, traffic, revenue, app downloads, market share, and country-wise adoption.
ChatGPT Statistics 2026: Top Picks
ChatGPT has 900 million weekly active users currently.
ChatGPT recorded 5.35 billion monthly visits in February 2026.
Over 2 billion daily queries are processed on ChatGPT.
10 million users globally use ChatGPT Plus.
ChatGPT hit $10 billion in annual recurring revenue.
With 79.98% ChatGPT market share, it leads in generative AI.
There are 1.44 billion ChatGPT app downloads so far.
Users send 2.5 billion prompts each day on ChatGPT.
How Many ChatGPT Users Are There?
According to the new OpenAI report released in February 2026, ChatGPT’s weekly active users have reached 900 million, more than double the 400 million reported in February 2025. Also, ChatGPT’s weekly active users reached 100 million in India.
The user base doubled in just weeks, driven by new features and improved AI capabilities.
Between December 2024 and February 2025, users grew by 33%, from 300 million to 400 million.
Here is a table displaying the number of ChatGPT weekly active users over time
.

ChatGPT maintains a strong position in the United States with an estimated 77.2 million monthly active users, reflecting its continued popularity and reliance as a go-to AI tool in one of its largest user bases.

ChatGPT MAU (Monthly Active Users)
ChatGPT recorded more than 5.35 billion monthly visits in 2026. However, these are traffic numbers, not unique users. Using the estimate of 900 million weekly active users, ChatGPT’s actual MAU is expected to be over 1 billion, as weekly user counts include the same individuals across multiple weeks.
That’s a 6.5% decline from the previous month, where ChatGPT MAU (monthly visits) was about 5.72 billion.
Note:
Because OpenAI hasn’t publicly disclosed its monthly users, we can only go by the estimates.
Source:
SimilarWeb
How Many People Use ChatGPT Daily?
Right now, ChatGPT gets 193.33 million visits per day. ChatGPT DAU (calculated as per weekly reports) would be an estimated 114.2 million users per day.
Per hour, ChatGPT.com sees around 806 million visits.
Per minute, that’s roughly 134,259 visits for ChatGPT.
Every second, ChatGPT.com receives about 2,238 visits globally.
The table below shares ChatGPT’s daily visits breakdown:
Time
Number of visitors
Daily
193.33 million
Per Hour
806 million
Per Minute
134,259
Per Second
2,238
Note:
There is no official data breakdown for the daily, per-hour, and per-minute. In order to calculate this, we broke down the data from monthly visits as seen from SimilarWeb. It’s also important to note that
the number of visits isn’t equal to the number of users.
Source:
Similarweb
How Many ChatGPT Queries Per Day?
ChatGPT processes over 2.5 billion queries per day, as per the latest data recorded in July 2025.
Just one week after its launch, ChatGPT was already handling over 10 million queries per day. Since then, this number has steadily increased, reflecting the growing user base and expanding reliance on the platform.
On December 5th, OpenAI launched its “12 Days of Shipmas” event, introducing ChatGPT Pro. This new subscription tier, priced at $200 per month, is designed for researchers, engineers, and anyone who needs access to advanced, research-grade AI on a daily basis.
Source:
Verge, ChatGPT.
ChatGPT Revenue
OpenAI has reached $10 billion in annual recurring revenue (ARR) as of June 2025. The $10 billion figure includes revenue from consumer products, ChatGPT business products, and API services.
Chat GPT is targeting $125 billion in revenue by 2029.
A recent $40 billion funding round in March 2025 valued the company at about 30 times revenue.
Source:
CNBC 1
,
CNBC 2
The total in-app ChatGPT revenue generated between March 2024 and March 2025 was $677,602,059.
In February 2026, ChatGPT recorded $227 million in IAP (in-app purchase).
From February 2025 to March 2025, in-app revenue grew by 43.6%.
Over a 12-month period, from March 2024 to March 2025, revenue increased by 591.6%.
It is interesting to note that ChatGPT achieved a continuous month-over-month revenue growth streak for 12 consecutive months:

In 2024, revenue more than tripled, reaching about $3.7 billion, in line with earlier predictions.
Just a year earlier, in 2023, OpenAI made $1 billion, showing how quickly the company is expanding.
Source:
Business Insider
.
ChatGPT Users Demographics
ChatGPT is widely spread, as per the demographics. Let’s have a detailed look below:
ChatGPT Users By Gender
54.66% of ChatGPT users are male, while 45.34% are female, showing a fairly balanced gender distribution (as per the traffic data).
This balanced split shows ChatGPT’s broad appeal, drawing users from all backgrounds for work, learning, and daily use. The numbers confirm its popularity as a go-to AI tool worldwide.
Source:
SimilarWeb
ChatGPT User By Age
The majority of ChatGPT users are between 18 and 34 years old, making up 52.99% of the total user base.
Mid-career professionals (35-54 years) also form a significant portion, accounting for 32.91% of users, showing that ChatGPT is widely used beyond just young adults.
Usage drops with age, with those 55 and older accounting for just 14.11% of total users.
Among them, only 5.23% are over 65, suggesting that adoption of ChatGPT is lower among older generations.

ChatGPT Users By Country
The U.S. accounts for 18.86% of total ChatGPT visitors, making it the platform’s largest user base.
India follows closely with 9.76%, showing a growing demand for AI tools, especially among students, professionals, and tech enthusiasts.
Brazil (5.08%) and the UK (4.29%) are also seeing strong adoption, reflecting the rising popularity of AI in Latin America and Europe.
Meanwhile, Japan (3.71%) stands out as one of ChatGPT’s top user bases in Asia after India.

ChatGPT Traffic Statistics
ChatGPT recorded 5.35 billion visits in February 2026.
Compared to January 2026, ChatGPT saw a 6.5% decline in traffic.
ChatGPT gets the highest traffic share from the United States (18.86%), followed by India (9.76%).
29. 72.78% people access ChatGPT from a desktop compared to 27.22% only from mobile.

ChatGPT Vs Google Stats
ChatGPT answers on average contain 1,686 characters per response vs 997 for Google.
ChatGPT breaks information into shorter sentences. On average, you will see 22 sentences on ChatGPT vs 10 on Google, making content shorter per line and easier to digest on GPT.
ChatGPT cites slightly more sources (10.42 links per response vs Google’s 9.26) but has a higher domain duplication rate (71% vs 58.49%).

How Many People Use ChatGPT Plus?
ChatGPT Plus has gained over 10 million users globally.
There are 3 million paying business users across ChatGPT Enterprise, Team, and Edu plans.
ChatGPT users with paid accounts went up by 1 million in total. (from 2 million in February 2025)
Source:
CNBC 2
How Many People Use ChatGPT For Writing?
According to a Pew Research Center survey, 26% of U.S. teens have used ChatGPT for schoolwork, up from 13% in 2023.
ChatGPT is widely used in the workplace for various tasks, including writing. Around 57% content marketers use AI for drafting content.
One in five adults in the U.S. uses ChatGPT for work-related tasks, with a significant portion of them utilizing it for tasks such as content writing, email composition, and marketing copy.
Source:
Siege Media, Digital Silk
While ChatGPT has become a go-to AI tool, many users still rely on additional tools to polish and refine their work. One of the most popular companions is Grammarly, which ensures grammar and clarity are on point after ChatGPT drafts your text. If you’re a frequent ChatGPT user looking to upgrade your writing workflow, you can grab an
exclusive Grammarly discount
to make your content sharper and more professional.
ChatGPT Usage Statistics
ChatGPT Users worldwide spent an average of 6 minutes and 5 seconds per session.
Source:
Similarweb
It just took 2 months for ChatGPT to reach the 100 million mark, and it is still going strong with the count.
Comparatively, it took
Facebook
four and a half years to reach the same mark.
ChatGPT was the fastest app to reach 100 million users before the launch of “Instagram Threads.”
The Threads app reached the 100 million user mark in just 2 days, while ChatGPT took 2 months.
Nevertheless, the
usage of Threads has rapidly decreased
while ChatGPT’s usage has skyrocketed.

ChatGPT App Statistics
The ChatGPT mobile app reached its highest monthly downloads at 73.4 million across the App Store and Google Play in December 2025. In February 2026,it recorded 68 million downloads.
Till now, ChatGPT’s total downloads have reached 1.44 billion since May 2023.

Future Of ChatGPT: Predictions & Estimates (2026)
The next phases of ChatGPT’s development are centered on transforming it into an autonomous, specialized, and infrastructure-optimized AI platform. This is the core strategy, evidenced by the release of agentic capabilities in models like GPT-5 and features like “Deep Research” and “Computer Use.”
Chat GPT is planning to launch a “Super Assistant” mode that will help users manage calendars, email, trip planning, and external apps. Current features like “Computer Use” and “Connectors” (for Dropbox, Notion, etc.) are the first steps toward this.
ChatGPT also plans to launch specialized modes for experts in fields such as law, healthcare, or finance.
By 2026, we can expect ChatGPT to push custom AI chips to run models on a cheaper budget and reduce reliance on third-party hardware suppliers.
Source:
Verge,
OpenAI
,
AI Multiple
